text: Science has a clearer story about aquifers than social media does. Aquifers are underground layers that store water, crucial for our survival. But did you know they can take thousands of years to refill? In the U.S., the Ogallala Aquifer supplies water to millions. Without it, economies would crumble. Protecting aquifers is protecting our future. Every drop counts. Curious about what else lies beneath? Hit like and follow for more!
